title: Temporally count items
summary_html: Track counts of detected items and entities over time — how many chairs today vs. yesterday, how often the cup moves. No implementation yet, but item 2 has already laid the groundwork.

cards.title: Dedup over time exists
cards.html: ObjectDB already merges repeat sightings, so "how many distinct cups" is a database query, not new perception work.

cards.title: Per-item counters exist
cards.html: Every Object.detections_count is a running observation count, incremented on each merged sighting.

cards.title: What's missing
cards.html: A time axis: snapshotting counts per interval, retention, and a query/skill surface for "counts over the last hour/day."

skills_note: no skill yet (idea) — will build on ObjectDB (dimos/perception/detection/objectDB.py) and Object.detections_count
